Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Added Hawk Run vendor selling — Always Vendor list, auto-vendor for below-floor items, inventory overlays, and Hawk Settings config tab. Refactored AutoPinch into 5 focused classes.
